scripts.build:libs: ng build ui-utils && ng build ui-icons && ng build ui-theme && ng build ui-core && ng build ui-layout
scripts.watch:base: concurrently "ng build ui-utils --watch" "ng build ui-icons --watch" "ng build ui-theme --watch"
scripts.watch:core: wait-on dist/ui-utils/package.json dist/ui-icons/package.json dist/ui-theme/package.json && ng build ui-core --watch
scripts.dev:libs: concurrently "npm run watch:base" "npm run watch:core" "npm run watch:layout"
scripts.dev: npm run build:libs && concurrently "npm run dev:libs" "ng serve playground"
